foreign_ownership_restrictions: Section 310(b) of the Communications Act restricts foreign ownership of broadcast and common carrier licensees to 20% direct and 25% indirect, subject to FCC review. Satellite services under Title III may face different thresholds. FCC has a Team Telecom national security review process for foreign ownership.
data_sovereignty: No federal data localization mandate for satellite operators. Sector-specific rules apply (ITAR for defense-related data, HIPAA for health data). CFIUS review possible for foreign acquisitions involving sensitive data.
spectrum_licensing: FCC allocates spectrum per the Table of Frequency Allocations. Satellite operators apply through the International Bureau for space station and earth station licenses. Processing rounds for NGSO systems. Coordination with NTIA for federal spectrum.
landing_rights: Earth station licenses required for receive and transmit. Market access petitions for foreign-licensed satellites seeking US market access under the DISCO II framework.
estimated_approval_timeline: 6-18 months depending on complexity and processing round status
key_requirements: Space station license application via FCC International Bureau
Earth station license for ground segment
Coordination with NTIA for government spectrum bands
Team Telecom national security review for foreign applicants

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Common carrier or private radio license from FCC
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Space station license and earth station authorization
telecom_services_requirements.interconnection: Regulated under Title II for common carriers

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. The National Security and Investment Act 2021 gives government power to review acquisitions in communications sector on national security grounds.
data_sovereignty: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018 apply. Adequate data protection under EU standards. No specific satellite data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: Ofcom manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators require spectrum authorization. Shared spectrum access framework for certain bands.
landing_rights: Satellite network license required from Ofcom for providing services in the UK. Wireless telegraphy license for earth stations.
key_requirements: UK Space Agency orbital license for UK-launched satellites

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: General Conditions of Entitlement for electronic communications
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite network license from Ofcom

regulator_name: ISED (Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Canadian Telecommunications Act limits foreign ownership of facilities-based carriers to 20% direct / 33.3% indirect through holding company. Satellite operators classified as carriers are subject to these limits. Exemptions possible for foreign satellite operators providing services via Canadian earth stations.
data_sovereignty: PIPEDA (Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act) governs private sector data. No strict satellite data localization, but cross-border transfer rules apply.
spectrum_licensing: ISED manages Canadian Table of Frequency Allocations. Satellite operators apply for radio licenses. Domestic satellite licensing through the Licensing and Spectrum Management branch.
landing_rights: Foreign satellite operators must obtain landing rights approval. Earth station licenses required from ISED.
key_requirements: Landing rights approval for foreign satellite systems
Coordination with US for cross-border spectrum

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Radio license and satellite service authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators under German telecommunications law. EU framework applies. Foreign direct investment screening under AWV (Außenwirtschaftsverordnung) for critical infrastructure.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG) supplements GDPR. No specific satellite data localization requirements beyond GDPR compliance.
spectrum_licensing: BNetzA manages German frequency allocation plan. Satellite operators need frequency assignment. EU harmonized spectrum decisions apply.
landing_rights: Earth station licenses from BNetzA. EU mutual recognition framework simplifies access for EU-licensed operators.
key_requirements: Notification to BNetzA for telecommunications services
Foreign investment screening for critical infrastructure

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: TKG notification requirement for telecom services
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency assignment and satellite service notification

regulator_name: ARCEP (Autorité de Régulation des Communications Électroniques, des Postes et de la Distribution de la Presse)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. Foreign investment screening applies to strategic sectors under French Monetary and Financial Code (Article L151-3). Space and defense activities subject to government review.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies. CNIL (Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés) enforces data protection. No specific satellite data localization requirements beyond GDPR.
spectrum_licensing: ARCEP manages spectrum. ANFR (Agence Nationale des Fréquences) coordinates frequency assignments. Satellite operators need authorization for spectrum use.
landing_rights: Authorization from ARCEP for satellite communications services. Earth station frequency assignments from ANFR.
key_requirements: ANFR frequency assignment for earth stations
CNES authorization for space operations (French Space Operations Act)
Foreign investment screening for strategic activities

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Declaration to ARCEP for telecom services
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite operator authorization and frequency assignment

regulator_name: AGCOM (Autorità per le Garanzie nelle Comunicazioni)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators under Italian law. EU framework applies. Golden power rules allow government intervention in strategic sectors including telecommunications and defense.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies. Garante per la protezione dei dati personali enforces data protection. No specific satellite data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: MISE (Ministry of Economic Development) manages spectrum allocation. AGCOM regulates electronic communications. Satellite operators need frequency authorization.
landing_rights: Authorization from MISE for satellite earth stations. General authorization regime for electronic communications services.
key_requirements: Golden power review for strategic acquisitions

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: General authorization for electronic communications networks and services
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency license

regulator_name: CNMC (Comisión Nacional de los Mercados y la Competencia)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Foreign direct investment screening under Law 19/2003 for strategic sectors.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies. AEPD (Agencia Española de Protección de Datos) enforces data protection. No specific satellite data localization.
spectrum_licensing: SETSI (Secretaría de Estado de Telecomunicaciones e Infraestructuras Digitales) manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency concessions.
landing_rights: General authorization for electronic communications. Individual license for spectrum use.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency concession

regulator_name: ACM (Authority for Consumers and Markets) / Agentschap Telecom
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Dutch foreign investment screening for vital providers of telecom services.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies. AP (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens) enforces data protection. No satellite-specific data localization.
spectrum_licensing: Agentschap Telecom manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency registration or license.
landing_rights: Registration or license from Agentschap Telecom for earth stations. EU general authorization for services.
key_requirements: Registration with ACM for electronic communications
Foreign investment screening for vital telecom providers

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency license and service registration

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Swedish Protective Security Act may apply to critical telecommunications infrastructure.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies. IMY (Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten) enforces data protection. No satellite-specific data localization.
spectrum_licensing: PTS manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency permits.
landing_rights: Frequency permit from PTS for earth stations. Notification for electronic communications services.
key_requirements: Notification to PTS for electronic communications
Protective security assessment for critical infrastructure

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency permit and service notification

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EEA framework applies (Norway is not an EU member but follows EU telecom directives through EEA). National security screening for critical infrastructure acquisitions.
data_sovereignty: Norwegian Personal Data Act implements GDPR-equivalent protections (EEA). Datatilsynet enforces. No satellite-specific data localization.
spectrum_licensing: Nkom manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency authorization.
landing_rights: Frequency authorization from Nkom for earth stations. Registration for electronic communications.
key_requirements: Registration with Nkom for electronic communications

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency authorization and service registration

regulator_name: TDRA (Telecommunications and Digital Government Regulatory Authority)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Telecommunications services require licensing from TDRA. Foreign ownership in telecommunications is restricted — operators must be UAE-incorporated entities. Free zones (e.g., ADGM, DIFC) may have different rules for technology companies. Strategic partnerships with local entities typical.
data_sovereignty: Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on Personal Data Protection. Data localization requirements for certain government and sensitive data. Satellite operators may need to store certain data locally.
spectrum_licensing: TDRA manages UAE National Frequency Plan. Satellite operators need spectrum license. Ka-band and Ku-band available subject to coordination.
landing_rights: TDRA authorization required for all satellite services in the UAE. Licensed operators only (Etisalat/e& and du historically, but market opening).

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and spectrum authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign investment in telecommunications allowed up to 100% since 2021 reforms, subject to licensing conditions. CST approval required. National security review applies.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL) enacted 2021. Data localization requirements for certain categories of data. Satellite operators may need to ensure data processing compliance within KSA.
spectrum_licensing: CST manages Saudi National Frequency Plan. Satellite operators need spectrum assignment. Vision 2030 driving expansion of satellite services licensing.
landing_rights: CST authorization required for satellite landing rights. Unified license framework being modernized.
key_requirements: Saudi Space Agency coordination for space operations

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service provider license

regulator_name: DoT (Department of Telecommunications) / TRAI (Telecom Regulatory Authority of India)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: 100% FDI allowed in telecommunications since 2021 reforms (up to 49% automatic route, beyond 49% requires government approval). Satellite communications FDI under review — IN-SPACe authorization required for space activities.
data_sovereignty: Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023. Data localization requirements for certain sensitive personal data. Government data must be stored in India. Satellite operators handling Indian data subject to localization rules.
spectrum_licensing: DoT/WPC (Wireless Planning & Coordination Wing) manages spectrum. Indian Space Policy 2023 liberalizing satellite communications. IN-SPACe as single-window for space activities.
landing_rights: DoT authorization for satellite gateway earth stations. GMPCS (Global Mobile Personal Communications by Satellite) license framework. Recent reforms creating SATCOM licensing framework.
key_requirements: GMPCS or SATCOM license from DoT
Security conditions and lawful interception capability

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: SATCOM or GMPCS authorization

regulator_name: MIC (Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications generally unrestricted. NTT has specific foreign ownership limits (33.3%). Satellite operators not subject to foreign ownership restrictions unless classified as designated telecommunications carriers.
data_sovereignty: Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI). No strict data localization requirement, but cross-border transfer rules apply. Adequate data protection framework recognized by EU.
spectrum_licensing: MIC manages spectrum allocation. Radio station license required for earth stations. Satellite operators coordinate through MIC Telecommunications Bureau.
landing_rights: Telecommunications business notification to MIC. Radio station license for earth stations.
key_requirements: Radio station license for earth stations

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Notification or registration with MIC depending on service type
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Radio station license and telecommunications business registration

regulator_name: MSIT (Ministry of Science and ICT) / KCC (Korea Communications Commission)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in facilities-based telecommunications limited to 49%. Satellite operators providing services in Korea subject to this cap. Special permission required for foreign operators.
data_sovereignty: Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA). Cross-border data transfer requires consent or equivalent protection. Financial and medical data have stricter localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: MSIT manages spectrum allocation. Radio station license required. Korea Radio Research Agency (RRA) handles technical standards.
landing_rights: MSIT authorization for satellite telecommunications services. Facilities-based or resale license required.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite telecommunications service license

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. Foreign Investment Review Board (FIRB) screening applies for significant investments in telecommunications infrastructure. Telstra has specific foreign ownership limits.
data_sovereignty: Privacy Act 1988 and Australian Privacy Principles (APPs). No general data localization requirement. Critical infrastructure designation under SOCI Act may impose data handling requirements.
spectrum_licensing: ACMA manages spectrum. Satellite operators need apparatus license or spectrum license. Australian Radiofrequency Spectrum Plan aligns with ITU allocations.
landing_rights: Carrier license or nominated carrier declaration for satellite services. ACMA apparatus license for earth stations.
key_requirements: Carrier license or nominated carrier declaration
ACMA apparatus license for earth stations
FIRB approval for significant foreign investments
SOCI Act compliance for critical infrastructure

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Carrier license and spectrum authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications since Constitutional Amendment 36/2002. Foreign satellite operators can obtain landing rights. Local representation required.
data_sovereignty: LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados) — Brazil's data protection law. ANPD enforces. No strict satellite data localization, but data protection officer appointment required for certain data processing.
spectrum_licensing: Anatel manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need right of exploitation (direito de exploração). Radio frequency authorization required.
landing_rights: Anatel authorization for foreign satellite systems to serve Brazilian market. Landing rights application through Anatel.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service exploitation right

regulator_name: ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign operators must partner with local licensed entity. No explicit foreign ownership cap for satellite services, but landing rights require ANRT authorization.
data_sovereignty: Telecommunications data processing governed by Law 09-08. CDR data must be accessible to ANRT upon request. No strict data localization requirement for satellite operators currently, but data protection authority (CNDP) oversight applies.
spectrum_licensing: Spectrum allocated by ANRT. Satellite operators need frequency assignment authorization. Ka-band and Ku-band coordination through ITU BR framework.
landing_rights: Required for all satellite services offering connectivity in Morocco. Application through ANRT with technical dossier.
key_requirements: ANRT authorization for satellite landing rights
Compliance with Law 09-08 on data protection
Technical dossier submission including coverage maps

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: License required from ANRT for all telecom services
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Separate satellite service authorization required

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. Foreign companies must register in Nigeria. Local content requirements may apply under NCDP (Nigerian Content Development and Monitoring Board).
data_sovereignty: Nigeria Data Protection Act 2023 (NDPA). NDPC (Nigeria Data Protection Commission) enforces. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequacy assessment. Verify with local counsel for satellite-specific requirements.
spectrum_licensing: NCC manages spectrum. Satellite operators need spectrum license. NASRDA (National Space Research and Development Agency) coordinates space activities.
landing_rights: NCC authorization required for satellite services in Nigeria. Gateway license for earth stations.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Individual or class license from NCC
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite network services license

regulator_name: ICASA (Independent Communications Authority of South Africa)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Electronic Communications Act allows up to 100% foreign ownership in telecommunications, but BEE (Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment) requirements apply. 30% historically disadvantaged person ownership requirement for license applicants.
data_sovereignty: POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act) enacted 2020, enforced by Information Regulator. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection requirements. No satellite-specific localization.
spectrum_licensing: ICASA manages spectrum. Satellite operators need radio frequency spectrum license. Individual electronic communications service license.
landing_rights: ICASA individual electronic communications service (I-ECS) license. Radio frequency spectrum license for earth stations.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: I-ECS or I-ECN license from ICASA
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: I-ECS license with satellite service endorsement

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. Open market policy. Designated entities in critical infrastructure subject to ownership review.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) 2012. No general data localization requirement. Financial services have sector-specific rules (MAS guidelines). Singapore aims to be a data hub.
spectrum_licensing: IMDA manages spectrum. Satellite operators need spectrum right. Light-touch licensing regime for satellite services.
landing_rights: Facilities-based operator (FBO) or service-based operator (SBO) license. Spectrum right for earth stations.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: FBO or SBO license from IMDA
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service operator license and spectrum right

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications limited to 67% for network providers, 49% for application/content providers. Satellite operators may be subject to these limits depending on service classification. Local partner required.
data_sovereignty: Government Regulation 71/2019 on Electronic Systems. Data localization requirements for public electronic systems and certain strategic data. Personal Data Protection Law (PDP Law) enacted 2022 with transition period.
spectrum_licensing: Kominfo manages spectrum. SDPPI (Directorate General of Resources and Devices) handles frequency allocation. Satellite operators need frequency allocation permit.
landing_rights: Telecommunications service provider license from Kominfo. Frequency allocation for earth stations from SDPPI.
key_requirements: Data localization compliance for certain data categories

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service provider license and frequency allocation

foreign_ownership_restrictions: 100% foreign ownership allowed in telecommunications since 2014 constitutional reform. Satellite operations subject to concession from IFT. Landing rights available for foreign satellite systems.
data_sovereignty: Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data (LFPDPPP). INAI enforces. No satellite-specific data localization requirements. Cross-border data transfer allowed with consent or adequate protection.
spectrum_licensing: IFT manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need orbital resources concession. Frequency band concessions granted by IFT.
landing_rights: IFT authorization for foreign satellite operators to provide services in Mexico. Landing rights through bilateral agreements or individual authorization.
key_requirements: Landing rights authorization for foreign satellites

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite concession and orbital resource assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No general foreign ownership restrictions for satellite services. National security review applies. Satellite operators serving Israeli market need MOC authorization.
data_sovereignty: Privacy Protection Law 5741-1981 and Privacy Protection Regulations. Israel has EU adequacy decision for data transfers. No satellite-specific data localization requirements. Verify with local counsel for defense-related data.
spectrum_licensing: MOC manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency license. Israel Space Agency (ISA) coordinates space activities.
landing_rights: MOC authorization for satellite services. General license or special license depending on service type.
key_requirements: MOC general or special telecommunications license
National security clearance for sensitive applications

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: General or special license from MOC
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization

regulator_name: BTK (Bilgi Teknolojileri ve İletişim Kurumu / Information and Communication Technologies Authority)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No general foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications. However, satellite operators need BTK authorization, and national security review applies. Turkish Space Agency (TUA) coordinates space policy.
data_sovereignty: Law No. 6698 on Protection of Personal Data (KVKK). Data Protection Authority (KVK Board) enforces. Cross-border data transfer requires adequate protection or explicit consent. Data localization pushed for certain government and financial data.
spectrum_licensing: BTK manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency usage right. National Frequency Plan aligned with CEPT and ITU.
landing_rights: BTK authorization for satellite services in Turkey. Earth station license required.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency usage right

regulator_name: MinTIC (Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones) / ANE (Agencia Nacional del Espectro)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications or satellite operators. Foreign companies must register in Colombia. Local legal representation required.
data_sovereignty: Law 1581 of 2012 on Personal Data Protection (Habeas Data). SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) enforces. Cross-border data transfer allowed to countries with adequate protection levels. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: ANE manages spectrum policy and planning. MinTIC grants spectrum permits. Satellite operators need frequency authorization. National Spectrum Plan aligned with ITU allocations.
landing_rights: MinTIC authorization required for satellite services in Colombia. Earth station license from ANE for frequency use.
key_requirements: ANE spectrum authorization for earth stations

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and spectrum permit

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications or satellite operators. Open market policy. Foreign companies may operate directly or through Chilean subsidiaries.
data_sovereignty: Law 19.628 on Protection of Private Life. Updated data protection bill (modeled on GDPR) under legislative process. No satellite-specific data localization requirements currently.
spectrum_licensing: Subtel manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need concession or permit for spectrum use. Competitive bidding for scarce spectrum.
landing_rights: Subtel authorization for satellite services. Concession for public telecommunications services using satellite.
key_requirements: Chilean Space Agency (ACE) coordination for space activities

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service concession and spectrum authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership cap for telecommunications. Foreign satellite operators need ENACOM authorization for landing rights. Local legal representation required. Reciprocity conditions may apply.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Law 25.326. AAIP (Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública) enforces. Argentina has EU adequacy status. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: ENACOM manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency authorization. National Frequency Allocation Plan aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: ENACOM authorization required for foreign satellite operators. Landing rights granted based on reciprocity and coordination.
key_requirements: Landing rights authorization for foreign satellites

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: License from ENACOM under Argentina Digital Law
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and spectrum license

regulator_name: MTC (Ministerio de Transportes y Comunicaciones) / OSIPTEL
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications. Foreign satellite operators may obtain concessions. Local legal representation required for licensing.
data_sovereignty: Law 29733 on Protection of Personal Data. National Authority for Personal Data Protection (ANPD) enforces. Cross-border data transfer allowed to countries with adequate protection. No satellite-specific data localization.
spectrum_licensing: MTC manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need radio spectrum assignment. OSIPTEL regulates telecommunications market.
landing_rights: MTC concession required for satellite services in Peru. Administrative concession for satellite landing rights.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service concession and spectrum assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications permitted but subject to licensing conditions. Satellite operators must obtain NTRA authorization. Local partnership or representation may be required for certain service categories.
data_sovereignty: Data Protection Law No. 151 of 2020. Cross-border data transfer requires adequate protection or regulatory approval. Government and security-related data subject to localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: NTRA manages spectrum allocation under Egypt's National Frequency Plan. Satellite operators need frequency license. Coordination with Egyptian Space Agency (EgSA) for space activities.
landing_rights: NTRA authorization required for satellite landing rights. Individual license for satellite service provision.
key_requirements: National security clearance for satellite services

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and frequency authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No explicit foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators under the Kenya Information and Communications Act. Foreign companies must register in Kenya. Local content and employment guidelines may apply.
data_sovereignty: Data Protection Act 2019. Office of the Data Protection Commissioner enforces. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection requirements. No satellite-specific data localization currently.
spectrum_licensing: CA manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency spectrum license. National Frequency Allocation Plan aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: CA authorization required for satellite services. Network facilities provider license and frequency authorization needed.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and spectrum license

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications allowed. GIPC (Ghana Investment Promotion Centre) Act requires minimum equity participation thresholds for foreign investors. Satellite operators need NCA authorization.
data_sovereignty: Data Protection Act 2012 (Act 843). Data Protection Commission enforces. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: NCA manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency authorization. National Frequency Allocation Table aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: NCA authorization for satellite services in Ghana. Earth station license required.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency license

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Telecommunications market recently liberalized (2021). Foreign ownership allowed through competitive licensing process. Safaricom consortium received first private operator license in 2021. Satellite services subject to ECA authorization.
data_sovereignty: Draft data protection legislation under development. Current regulations require telecommunications data to be accessible to ECA. Government data subject to localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: ECA manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency license. Market liberalization expanding spectrum access for new entrants.
landing_rights: ECA authorization required for satellite services. Historically state-controlled market now opening to licensed operators.
key_requirements: Compliance with emerging data protection framework
Ethiopian Space Science and Technology Institute coordination

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency license

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications allowed. Electronic and Postal Communications Act (EPOCA) governs licensing. Local representation required. Tanzania Investment Centre (TIC) registration for foreign investors.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Act (under development). Cybercrimes Act 2015 includes data-related provisions. Telecommunications data retention requirements per TCRA regulations.
spectrum_licensing: TCRA manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency spectrum license. National Frequency Allocation Table aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: TCRA authorization required for satellite services. Network service license and frequency license needed.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Network or application service license from TCRA
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and spectrum license

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications limited to 40% under the Philippine Constitution. Public Utilities Modernization Act (2022) relaxed restrictions for value-added services but maintained 40% cap for public telecommunications entities. Local partner required.
data_sovereignty: Data Privacy Act of 2012 (Republic Act 10173). National Privacy Commission (NPC) enforces. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection. No satellite-specific data localization currently.
spectrum_licensing: NTC manages spectrum. Satellite operators need provisional authority or certificate of public convenience and necessity (CPCN). Frequency assignment from NTC.
landing_rights: NTC authorization required for satellite services. CPCN or provisional authority needed for telecommunications operations.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service authorization and frequency assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications restricted: up to 49% for network infrastructure services, 65% for non-infrastructure services (under WTO commitments). Satellite services classified as infrastructure services. Joint venture with Vietnamese partner required.
data_sovereignty: Law on Cybersecurity (2018) and Decree 13/2023 on Personal Data Protection. Data localization requirements for certain categories of data. Satellite operators handling Vietnamese user data may need to store data locally.
spectrum_licensing: MIC manages spectrum through the Authority of Radio Frequency Management (ARFM). Satellite operators need frequency license. Vietnam's National Frequency Allocation Table aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: MIC authorization required for satellite services. Telecommunications license for satellite service provision in Vietnam.
key_requirements: Foreign ownership compliance (49% cap for infrastructure)

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and frequency authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign Business Act limits foreign ownership in telecommunications to 49%. Satellite operators classified as telecommunications must comply. BOI (Board of Investment) privileges may allow higher foreign ownership in certain promoted activities.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Act B.E. 2562 (2019) (PDPA). Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection standards. No satellite-specific data localization, but government data may have restrictions.
spectrum_licensing: NBTC manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency assignment. National Frequency Allocation Table aligned with ITU. GISTDA coordinates space activities.
landing_rights: NBTC authorization for satellite services in Thailand. Telecommunications business license required.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Type 1, 2, or 3 telecommunications license from NBTC
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and frequency assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications allowed up to 49% for network facilities provider (NFP) licensees. Higher foreign ownership possible with government approval on case-by-case basis. Bumiputera equity requirements apply.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA). Cross-border data transfer subject to ministerial approval for prescribed countries. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: MCMC manages spectrum under the Communications and Multimedia Act 1998. Satellite operators need spectrum assignment. Class or individual license depending on service type.
landing_rights: MCMC authorization for satellite services. NFP or network service provider (NSP) license and spectrum assignment required.
key_requirements: Foreign ownership compliance (49% cap for NFP)

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: NFP or NSP individual license from MCMC
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and spectrum assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications allowed up to 60% for most services. Satellite operators need BTRC authorization. Local partner may be required depending on service category. BIDA (Bangladesh Investment Development Authority) approval needed.
data_sovereignty: Digital Security Act 2018 governs cyber and data-related matters. Draft Data Protection Act under consideration. Government data subject to localization. Telecommunications operators must provide lawful interception capability.
spectrum_licensing: BTRC manages spectrum. Satellite operators need frequency assignment. National Frequency Allocation Plan aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: BTRC authorization for satellite services in Bangladesh. VSAT license or ISP license categories available.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: VSAT or satellite service license and frequency assignment

foreign_ownership_restrictions: 100% foreign ownership allowed in telecommunications under Pakistan's liberalized telecom policy. Satellite operators need PTA license. Security clearance required for foreign operators.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Bill under consideration. Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act 2016 applies. Telecommunications data retention required per PTA regulations. Lawful interception capability mandatory.
spectrum_licensing: PTA manages spectrum through the Frequency Allocation Board (FAB). Satellite operators need frequency license. Spectrum auctions for commercial bands.
landing_rights: PTA authorization for satellite services. Landing rights for foreign satellite operators subject to government approval.
key_requirements: Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act compliance

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and frequency authorization

regulator_name: UKE (Urząd Komunikacji Elektronicznej / Office of Electronic Communications)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Foreign investment screening under Polish law for critical infrastructure and telecommunications.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. UODO (Urząd Ochrony Danych Osobowych) enforces data protection. No satellite-specific data localization requirements beyond GDPR compliance.
spectrum_licensing: UKE manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency reservation. EU harmonized spectrum framework applies.
landing_rights: UKE authorization for satellite services. Frequency reservation for earth stations. EU general authorization for electronic communications.
key_requirements: UKE frequency reservation for earth stations
Foreign investment screening for critical infrastructure

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Notification to UKE for electronic communications
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency reservation and service notification

regulator_name: ANCOM (Autoritatea Națională pentru Administrare și Reglementare în Comunicații)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Foreign investment screening under Romanian national security legislation for critical infrastructure.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. ANSPDCP (Autoritatea Națională de Supraveghere a Prelucrării Datelor cu Caracter Personal) enforces. No satellite-specific data localization beyond GDPR.
spectrum_licensing: ANCOM manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency license. EU harmonized decisions apply.
landing_rights: ANCOM authorization for earth stations. General authorization for electronic communications services under EU framework.
key_requirements: ANCOM frequency license for earth stations

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency license and service notification

regulator_name: CTU (Český telekomunikační úřad / Czech Telecommunication Office)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Foreign investment screening under Czech Act on Screening of Foreign Direct Investments for critical infrastructure.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. UOOU (Úřad pro ochranu osobních údajů) enforces data protection. No satellite-specific data localization beyond GDPR.
spectrum_licensing: CTU manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need individual radio license for earth stations. EU harmonized spectrum decisions apply.
landing_rights: CTU radio license for earth stations. General authorization for electronic communications under EU framework.
key_requirements: CTU individual radio license for earth stations
Foreign investment screening for critical infrastructure

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Individual radio license and service notification

regulator_name: EETT (Εθνική Επιτροπή Τηλεπικοινωνιών και Ταχυδρομείων / Hellenic Telecommunications and Post Commission)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Greek foreign investment screening under national security provisions for critical infrastructure.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. HDPA (Hellenic Data Protection Authority) enforces. No satellite-specific data localization beyond GDPR.
spectrum_licensing: EETT manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need individual radio frequency license for earth stations. EU harmonized spectrum framework applies.
landing_rights: EETT authorization for earth stations. General authorization for electronic communications under EU framework.
key_requirements: EETT radio frequency license for earth stations

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency license and service notification

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Portuguese foreign investment screening for critical infrastructure under national defense provisions.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. CNPD (Comissão Nacional de Proteção de Dados) enforces data protection. No satellite-specific data localization requirements beyond GDPR.
spectrum_licensing: ANACOM manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need radio frequency license for earth stations. EU harmonized spectrum decisions apply.
landing_rights: ANACOM radio license for earth stations. General authorization for electronic communications under EU framework.
key_requirements: ANACOM radio frequency license for earth stations
Portugal Space coordination for space activities

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Frequency license and service notification

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. EU framework applies. Ireland's open-market policy welcomes foreign telecommunications investment. No foreign investment screening regime specific to telecoms.
data_sovereignty: EU GDPR applies directly. DPC (Data Protection Commission) enforces — Ireland hosts many major tech companies and DPC is a key EU regulator. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: ComReg manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need radio license for earth stations. EU harmonized spectrum decisions apply.
landing_rights: ComReg radio license for earth stations. General authorization for electronic communications under EU framework.
key_requirements: ComReg radio license for earth stations
Irish Aviation Authority coordination for certain installations

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Radio license and service notification

regulator_name: RSM (Radio Spectrum Management, Ministry of Business, Innovation and Employment)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: No specific foreign ownership restrictions for satellite operators. Overseas Investment Act applies to significant business assets — OIO (Overseas Investment Office) screening for investments exceeding thresholds in significant business assets or sensitive land.
data_sovereignty: Privacy Act 2020. No general data localization requirement. Cross-border data transfer allowed with adequate safeguards. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: RSM manages spectrum under the Radiocommunications Act 1989. Satellite operators need radio license or management right. Spectrum management rights available through competitive allocation.
landing_rights: RSM radio license for earth stations. Telecommunications service provider registration with Commerce Commission.
key_requirements: RSM radio license for earth stations
Commerce Commission registration for telecom services
OIO approval for significant foreign investments

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Radio license and service provider registration

foreign_ownership_restrictions: Telecommunications services provided through licensed operators. Foreign ownership restrictions depend on license category — historically limited market with Ooredoo and Vodafone Qatar. New entrants subject to CRA licensing. Qatar Free Zones may offer different terms.
data_sovereignty: Law No. 13 of 2016 on Personal Data Privacy. Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection. Government and critical data may have localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: CRA manages spectrum under Qatar's National Frequency Plan. Satellite operators need spectrum authorization. Ka-band and Ku-band coordination through CRA.
landing_rights: CRA authorization required for satellite services. Telecommunications service license needed.

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and spectrum authorization

regulator_name: CITRA (Communication and Information Technology Regulatory Authority)
foreign_ownership_restrictions: Foreign ownership in telecommunications subject to CITRA licensing conditions. Kuwait Direct Investment Promotion Authority (KDIPA) oversees foreign investment. Local partnership may be required depending on service category.
data_sovereignty: No comprehensive data protection law enacted yet (draft under consideration). Telecommunications Law No. 37 of 2014 includes data-related provisions. Government data subject to localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: CITRA manages spectrum allocation. Satellite operators need frequency authorization. National Frequency Plan aligned with ITU.
landing_rights: CITRA authorization required for satellite services. Telecommunications license for service provision.
key_requirements: KDIPA investment approval for foreign entities

telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and frequency authorization

foreign_ownership_restrictions: No general foreign ownership restrictions for telecommunications. Liberal investment environment. Satellite operators need TRA authorization. Bahrain Economic Development Board supports foreign investment in ICT sector.
data_sovereignty: Personal Data Protection Law (Law No. 30 of 2018). Cross-border data transfer subject to adequate protection. No satellite-specific data localization requirements.
spectrum_licensing: TRA manages spectrum under Bahrain's National Frequency Plan. Satellite operators need spectrum authorization. Open and competitive licensing framework.
landing_rights: TRA authorization for satellite services. Individual or class license depending on service type.

telecom_services_requirements.terrestrial: Individual or class license from TRA
telecom_services_requirements.non_terrestrial: Satellite service license and spectrum authorization
